title: CustomizedLore
description: Adds a block that lets you add tooltip text to any item
body:
CustomizedLore is a mod for Minecraft that adds a Lore Customizer block, which can be used to add lore to any item. Using `&` followed by a format code will change the chat format (see Minecraft Wiki). To add a simple & character, use `&&`.

The Lore Customizer can be made by combining a crafting table with a book. Changing/adding lore to an item has no cost.
